description: Zip pouch in denim featuring a repurposed jeans pocket and decorative light-blue floral cotton stripes at the top, finished with a black zipper and denim pull tab.
Zip pouch repurposed from jeans, showcasing the waistband, belt loops, and pink floral embroidery on the front, with a black zipper and leather tab.
Denim zip pouch with an inset jeans pocket and two horizontal strips of blue floral cotton trim, finished with a silver zipper.
Dark denim zip pouch featuring an embroidered back-jean pocket and three vertical strips of denim-and-print ribbon, with a black zipper.
Simple rectangular zip pouch in blue denim with a black zipper and matching wrist strap.
Denim zip pouch featuring a slanted repurposed jeans pocket on the left and three vertical strips of light-blue floral cotton trim on the right, finished with a silver zipper and denim pull tab.
Denim zip pouch repurposed with a tilted back-pocket detail on the left and an embroidered geometric cotton patch on the right, topped by a silver zipper and black fabric pull.
